header: {"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; U; Android 12.0.0; zh-cn Build/V417IR) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/66.0.3359.126 MQQBrowser/20.0 Mobile Safari/537.36","Referer":"https://novel.html5.qq.com","Content-Type":"application/json"}

ruleBookInfo.author: $.data.bookInfo.author
ruleBookInfo.kind: {{(()=>{var b=JSON.parse(src).data.bookInfo;var ts=(b.lastSerialUpdateTime||0)*1000;var d=new Date(ts);var p=(n)=>n<10?'0'+n:''+n;var label=b.isfinish ? '已完结：' : '最近更新：';return [b.subject||'',b.subtype||'',label + d.getFullYear()+'-'+p(d.getMonth()+1)+'-'+p(d.getDate())].join(',');})()}}
ruleBookInfo.name: $.data.bookInfo.resourceName

ruleSearch.author: $.author
ruleSearch.checkKeyWord: 重生后我怎么多了个青梅
ruleSearch.name: $.title

ruleToc.chapterUrl: https://novel.html5.qq.com/be-api/content/ads-read,{"method":"POST","headers":{"User-Agent":"Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; U; Android 12.0.0; zh-cn Build/V417IR) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/66.0.3359.126 MQQBrowser/20.0 Mobile Safari/537.36","Referer":"https://novel.html5.qq.com","Content-Type":"application/json","Q-GUID":"{{Array.from({length:32},()=>'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789'.charAt(Math.floor(Math.random()*36))).join('')}}"},"body":"{\"Scene\":\"chapter\",\"ContentAnchorBatch\":[{\"BookID\":\"{{baseUrl.split('book_id=')[1].split('&')[0]}}\",\"ChapterSeqNo\":[{{result.serial_id}}]}]}"}

ruleContent.content: {{(function(){var html=src;if(html.indexOf('let token = "')>-1){var token=html.split('let token = "')[1].split('"')[0];var sep=chapter.url.indexOf('?')>-1?'&':'?';html=java.ajax(chapter.url+sep+'challenge='+java.encodeURI(token));}var s=html.split('<article class="page-content">');if(s.length<2)return '';s=s[1].split('<section>');if(s.length<2)return '';s=s[1];if(s.indexOf('<div class="abg"')>-1){s=s.split('<div class="abg"')[0];}else{s=s.split('</section>')[0];}return java.htmlFormat(s).trim();})()}}
ruleContent.title: article.page-content > h3@text
